Rum spirits. Include white, dark, and spiced rums. Exclude liqueurs.
Gin spirits. Include classic and flavored gins. Exclude other liquors.
Cognac brandy. Include VS, VSOP, and XO categories. Exclude vinjak and general brandies.
Tequila spirits. Include blanco, reposado, and añejo. Exclude mezcal unless specified.

Strong alcoholic beverages. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Rakija, Vodka, Vinjak, Pelinkovac, Whiskey, Liqueurs, Brandy, Rum, Gin, Cognac, Tequila). Covers unspecified or mixed spirits.
Light-colored beers. Include pilsner and lager. Exclude dark beers.
Beer without alcohol. Include 0.0% and low-alcohol beers. Exclude ciders and malt drinks.
Dark beers. Include stout, porter, and dark lagers. Exclude light beers.
Beer-based mixed drinks (radlers). Include beer with lemonade or fruit flavors. Exclude standard beers.
Beer products. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Light, Non-Alcoholic, Dark, Radlers). Covers unspecified or mixed beer.
White wines. Include dry, semi-dry, and sweet white wines. Exclude sparkling and rosé wines.
Rosé wines. Include dry, semi-dry, and sweet rosés. Exclude sparkling and red wines.
Red wines. Include dry, semi-dry, and sweet red wines. Exclude sparkling and rosé wines.
Pre-mixed spritzers. Include white wine spritzer and flavored spritz drinks. Exclude beer radlers.
Sparkling wines. Include prosecco, cava, champagne, and other sparkling varieties. Exclude spritzers.
Flavored and aromatized wines. Include vermouth and fruit-flavored wines. Exclude liqueurs and spirits.
Wine products. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (White, Rosé, Red, Spritzer, Sparkling, Flavored). Covers unspecified or mixed wines.
Kvass fermented drink. Include traditional rye bread kvass. Exclude beer and sodas.
Corn-based breakfast flakes. Include classic plain corn flakes. Exclude muesli or oat flakes.
Oat flakes for breakfast. Include rolled, quick, and instant oats. Exclude flavored granola.
Breakfast cereals and muesli products. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Corn Flakes, Oat Flakes). Covers unspecified or mixed cereals.
Plant-based protein powders and foods. Include soy, pea, rice, and hemp protein. Exclude dairy proteins.
Gluten-free bread. Include sliced and packaged bread made without gluten. Exclude regular bread.
Flour without gluten. Include rice, corn, buckwheat, and almond flour. Exclude wheat flour.
Gluten-free food items. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Plant Proteins, Bread, Flour). Covers unspecified or mixed gluten-free products.
Soy-based plant drink. Include sweetened and unsweetened soy milk. Exclude dairy milk.
Almond-based plant drink. Include plain and flavored almond milk. Exclude dairy milk.
Oat-based plant drink. Include plain and flavored oat milk. Exclude dairy milk.
Coconut-based plant drink. Include canned, bottled, and flavored versions. Exclude dairy milk and coconut oil.
Plant-based milk alternatives. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Soy, Almond, Oat, Coconut). Covers unspecified or mixed plant-based milks.
Hummus spreads. Include classic chickpea hummus and flavored varieties. Exclude other spreads.
Peanut butter spread. Include crunchy, smooth, and flavored peanut butter. Exclude pure peanuts.
Hazelnut spread butter. Include pure hazelnut spreads without cocoa. Exclude chocolate hazelnut creams.
Almond spread butter. Include natural and flavored almond butters. Exclude almond-based sweets.
Sesame seed paste (tahini). Include natural and flavored tahini. Exclude hummus.

Healthy spreads. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Hummus, Peanut Butter, Hazelnut Butter, Almond Butter, Tahini). Covers unspecified or mixed healthy spreads.
Healthy snack products. Include rice cakes, granola bars, and baked snacks. Exclude standard chips and sweets.
Wholegrain cookies and biscuits. Include fiber-rich and digestive biscuits. Exclude regular cookies.
Healthier sweet products. Include sugar-free chocolates, fruit bars, and protein-based sweets. Exclude standard candy.
Wholegrain breadsticks. Include high-fiber and multigrain grissini. Exclude regular breadsticks.

Healthy sweet and salty products. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Healthy Snacks, Wholegrain Biscuits, Healthy Sweets, Wholegrain Breadsticks). Covers unspecified or mixed products.
Rice cakes (galete). Include plain, salted, and flavored rice cakes. Exclude other crackers.
Coconut oil. Include virgin, refined, and cooking coconut oils. Exclude coconut milk.
Stevia-based sweeteners. Include tablets, powder, and liquid drops. Exclude other sweeteners.
Natural and artificial sweeteners. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Stevia). Covers unspecified or mixed sweeteners.
Chia seeds. Include black and white chia. Exclude chia-based snacks.
Buckwheat grain. Include whole buckwheat groats. Exclude flour or processed products.
Flax seeds. Include whole and ground flax. Exclude flax oil.
Pumpkin seeds (golica). Include raw, roasted, and salted pumpkin seeds. Exclude mixes with other seeds.
Couscous grain. Include instant and traditional couscous. Exclude flavored ready meals.
Millet grain. Include hulled and whole millet. Exclude flour or flakes.
Quinoa grain. Include white, red, and black quinoa. Exclude mixed seed products.

Whole grains and legumes. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Chia, Buckwheat, Flax, Pumpkin, Couscous, Millet, Quinoa). Covers unspecified or mixed grains.
Cakes. Include layered, sponge, and cream cakes. Exclude frozen cakes and pastries.
Small cakes and pastries. Include cookies, petit fours, and assorted bite-size sweets. Exclude packaged biscuits.
Frozen cakes. Include packaged frozen layer cakes. Exclude frozen desserts.
Frozen desserts. Include ice cream cakes, mousses, and assorted frozen sweets. Exclude frozen cakes.
Frozen cake and dessert products. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Frozen Cakes, Frozen Desserts). Covers unspecified or mixed frozen sweets.
Chestnut puree dessert. Include packaged sweetened chestnut cream. Exclude fresh chestnuts.
Whipped cream powder for cakes and desserts. Include instant and whipping cream mixes. Exclude dairy cream.
Pre-made mixes for pancakes and cakes. Include dry mixes for quick preparation. Exclude ready-made cakes.
Wafer sheets, cake layers, and pastry cups. Include oblande and tart bases. Exclude cookies and biscuits.
Ice cream in powder form. Include instant mixes for homemade ice cream. Exclude frozen ice cream.
Powdered pudding desserts. Include vanilla, chocolate, and flavored puddings. Exclude ready-to-eat puddings.
Chocolate bars for baking. Include cooking chocolate and couverture. Exclude regular chocolate bars.
Flavoring essences for baking. Include vanilla, rum, lemon, and other aromas. Exclude natural fruit or nut extracts unless labeled.
Cake decoration items. Include sprinkles, sugar decorations, and edible ornaments. Exclude candles and tools.
Toppings and glazes for cakes. Include chocolate, fruit, and caramel toppings. Exclude icings made from scratch.
Creamy dessert mixes. Include mousse and pudding-style powders. Exclude ready-to-eat dairy desserts.
Finely grated coconut flour for baking. Include sweetened and unsweetened coconut. Exclude coconut milk and oil.
Poppy seeds for baking. Include whole and ground poppy seeds. Exclude poppy oil.
Marzipan paste or figures. Include raw marzipan and decorative marzipan. Exclude almond butter.

Baking and cake additives. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Whipped Cream, Mixes, Wafers, Ice Cream Mix, Pudding, Baking Chocolate, Flavorings, Decorations, Toppings, Cream Desserts, Coconut Flour, Poppy Seeds, Marzipan). Covers unspecified or mixed cake ingredients.
Vanilla-flavored sugar. Include vanillin and natural vanilla sugar packets. Exclude plain sugar.
Cornstarch (gustin). Include thickening agents for sauces and desserts. Exclude flour.
Gelatin powder or sheets. Include unflavored and flavored gelatin. Exclude plant-based alternatives unless specified.
Baking soda (sodium bicarbonate). Used as a leavening agent. Exclude washing soda.
Baking powder. Include single- and double-acting varieties. Exclude baking soda.
Cocoa powder for baking and drinks. Include natural and alkalized cocoa. Exclude chocolate drink mixes.

Powdered baking ingredients. Fallback category — use only if product cannot be placed into a child category (Vanilla Sugar, Cornstarch, Gelatin, Baking Soda, Baking Powder, Cocoa). Covers unspecified or mixed powdered additives.
